calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-03-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Petitioners: Christine Chang Imrey and Thomas Raymond Szabo-Imrey, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Isal LeRoy Imrey, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Isla Mei Ling LeRoy Imrey.
Decree signed in open court.
